title: Hill Cipher Encryption and Decryption Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of encrypting a plaintext message and decrypting a ciphertext using the Hill Cipher method.
relationships: Plaintext is converted to numbers using a table
Numbers are grouped into blocks matching key matrix size
Each block is multiplied by the encryption key matrix
Result is taken modulo 26 to get ciphertext numbers
Ciphertext numbers are converted back to letters
Decryption uses the inverse key matrix to reverse the process
